task_goal: In Simple Calendar Pro, create a calendar event on 2023-10-15 at 15h with the title 'Appointment for Annual Report' and the description 'We will discuss annual budget.'. The event should last for 15 mins.
task_goal_rewrite: A calendar event titled 'Appointment for Annual Report' with description 'We will discuss annual budget.' is created in Simple Calendar Pro, scheduled to occur on 2023-10-15 from 15:00 to 15:15.

checkpoints.description: The event titled 'Appointment for Annual Report' is visible in Simple Calendar Pro's 2023-10-15 calendar view.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the 2023-10-15 day/week/month calendar view displaying the event title

checkpoints.description: The event details show a start time of 15:00, end time of 15:15, and description text 'We will discuss annual budget.'.
checkpoints.evidence_hint: Screenshot of the event's detailed information screen showing the exact start time, end time, and description content

success_rule: Success is confirmed when both required checkpoints are fully satisfied, verifying the event exists with all specified title, date, time duration, and description details.
